title: Fly Mod 3D
description: Control flying by looking into a direction. Provides speed modifier.
body:
Toggle mod by pressing `b`. This can be remapped in the controls menu.

The main feature of this mod is `Mouse Control`. With this you fly into the direction your are looking. You can ascend and descend, fly around a corner, by only moving forward. 
If this isn't your cup of tea, don't worry, it can be disabled to then behave similar to default flying.

The following modifiers are tuned to be close to the default Minecraft speeds, but they are fully customizable:
- Amount of blocks to fly up/down per tick
- Fly speed modifier
- Run speed modifier
- Speed up flying up/down with fly speed modifier

QoL modifiers:
- Toggle default movement fading when flying (only works with mouse control disabled)
- Use only in creative mode
- Override exhaustion (no exhaustion through sprinting)

---

**Limitations**

To allow fair gameplay when playing online / on a dedicated server, speed modifiers are ignored. Also, activating flying is only possible if the server has granted you permission to fly. 
On Bukkit Server you would need access to `/fly` and execute the command to be able to activate flying.

If problems with anti-cheat or other kind of plugins occur, please create an issue on GitHub.

---

**Supported languages**
- Deutsch / German
- English
